title: Code 707
html:
"Don't you want to become one with me?"
It has been suggested that the contents of this page should be incorporated into another pre-existing article.
Please discuss this issue on the talk page, or begin editing the page.

This is the code designation used by the Marduk Institute to denote Tokyo-3 First Municipal Middle School, where the students of Class 2-A are potential 4th level pilot candidates, a pool from which the Marduk Institute may select any 14-year-old student for Project E.
summary: This is the code designation used by the Marduk Institute to denote Tokyo-3 First Municipal Middle School, where the students of Class 2-A are potential 4th level pilot candidates, a pool from which the Marduk Institute may select any 14-year-old student for Project E.

Article: Code 707
This is the code designation used by the Marduk Institute to denote Tokyo-3 First Municipal Middle School, where the students of Class 2-A are potential 4th level pilot candidates, a pool from which the Marduk Institute may select any 14-year-old student for Project E.
